question:

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select compliant ones).

**\bbox{A,B,D,E,G}**

| Option | Verdict | Issue |
|--------|---------|-------|
| A | ✅ Compliant | Correct `YYYYMMDD_description.json` format |
| B | ✅ Compliant | Correct `YYYYMMDD_description.json` format |
| C | ❌ Non-compliant | Date suffix instead of prefix |
| D | ✅ Compliant | Correct `YYYYMMDD_description.csv` format |
| E | ✅ Compliant | Correct `YYYYMMDD_description.json` format |
| F | ❌ Non-compliant | Missing date prefix, camelCase description |
| G | ✅ Compliant | Correct `YYYYMMDD_description.md` format |
